feedback.text: I'm not a person of many words, so I keep it short. I do not like it that companies can take our stuff, where we paid money for, without even a single cent of compensation. Throw in all the other secret rules they hide in their agreements where they pretty much say we can't do anything without their consent. I find that it is time that the EU shows these companies that they aren't the boss, and that they don't make the rules. So I hope by letting my voice heard that the EU will make some kind of legislation that will protect the people from these predatory practices.
